title: hemizonia congesta var. calyculata
intro: Hemizonia congesta var. calyculata, also known as the Tarweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the coastal regions of California and Oregon. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues. Hemizonia congesta var. calyculata can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
